title: hirtella thouarsiana subsp. obtusifolia
intro: Hirtella thouarsiana subsp. obtusifolia, also known as the obtuse-leaved hirtella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Chrysobalanaceae. This plant is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in West Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of hirtella thouarsiana subsp. obtusifolia include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to create topical creams and ointments for various health conditions.
